title: Think and Grow Rich
author: Napoleon Hill
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A 13-step staircase rising from lower-left to upper-right. The 13th step is highlighted in RED. The 13 steps are labeled 1-13 in small caps. -->
  <g transform="translate(200 1300)" fill="none">
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2">
      <!-- Each step is a 90px tall block, 80px wide. -->
      <path d="M 0 0 L 0 -90 L 80 -90 L 80 -180 L 160 -180 L 160 -270 L 240 -270 L 240 -360 L 320 -360 L 320 -450 L 400 -450 L 400 -540 L 480 -540 L 480 -630 L 560 -630 L 560 -720 L 640 -720 L 640 -810 L 720 -810 L 720 -900 L 800 -900 L 800 -990 L 880 -990 L 880 -1080 L 960 -1080 L 960 -1170 L 1040 -1170"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The 13th step (the final one) highlighted in RED -->
    <g stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3" fill="none">
      <path d="M 1040 -1170 L 1120 -1170 L 1120 -1080 L 1040 -1080"/>
    </g>
    <line x1="1040" y1="-1080" x2="1040" y2="-1170" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3"/>
    <line x1="1040" y1="-1170" x2="1120" y2="-1170" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3"/>
    <line x1="1120" y1="-1170" x2="1120" y2="-1080" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3"/>
    <!-- Step numbers (1-13) -->
    <g font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.04em" text-anchor="middle">
      <text x="40" y="30">01</text>
      <text x="120" y="-60">02</text>
      <text x="200" y="-150">03</text>
      <text x="280" y="-240">04</text>
      <text x="360" y="-330">05</text>
      <text x="440" y="-420">06</text>
      <text x="520" y="-510">07</text>
      <text x="600" y="-600">08</text>
      <text x="680" y="-690">09</text>
      <text x="760" y="-780">10</text>
      <text x="840" y="-870">11</text>
      <text x="920" y="-960">12</text>
      <text x="1080" y="-1100" fill="#fc1c46">13</text>
    </g>
  </g>
  <text x="200" y="380" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">13 STEPS TO RICHES</text>
  <text x="1320" y="240" text-anchor="end" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.04em">RICHES</text>
</svg>
rationale: A 13-step staircase rising from lower-left to upper-right. The 13th step is the only RED one — the final step, the riches. 300px uppercase 'Think and / Grow Rich' title sits at the bottom in weight 500. The visual thesis: wealth is a process, a set of 13 steps, and the last one is the most dramatic — the moment of arrival.
